content.en:
The Cangyu Bone Emperor slowly explained the forces behind the six forbidden places in the Dark Forbidden Domain, while Ye Tian listened with his ears.

The Cangyu Bone Emperor said: "The forces behind the six forbidden lands of the Dark Forbidden Domain are stronger than our bone clan, and the gates established by the six forbidden lands are all second-order gates!"

"What, the Second Order!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

He knew very well what the second-order gate represented, and the gate established by the Blood Mist Alliance was the second-order gate.

Although he didn't know how to establish the Second Order Gate, the forces that could establish the Second Order Gate were extremely powerful.

There is only one second-order gate in the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, but I didn't expect that the Dark Forbidden Domain actually has six second-order gates, isn't it too incredible.

Immediately, he asked, "Why are there six second-order people in the Dark Forbidden Realm, I have been to other exotic worlds, and the one exotic world I have been to before has only one second-order gate. "

The Cangyu Bone Emperor did not answer directly, but said euphemistically: "The Dark Forbidden Domain seems to be a little different from other exotic worlds, as for how it is different, I don't know, but it is worth six powerful forces to open the second-order gate. "

Ye Tian didn't know if Emperor Cangyu really didn't know, or if he deliberately didn't say it, but he didn't continue to investigate.

Emperor Cangyu continued: "Those six foreign forces were able to establish a second-order gate, and they had a lot of supreme-level existences, and even had third-level supreme-level existences. It is even rumored that there is an invincible existence among the six major forces. Of course, we haven't been to the exotic world of the six major forces, so we can't know any more information. But according to several dealings, the most powerful of the six major forces should belong to Calamity Black Mountain, followed by the Firmament Sword Tomb, and the other four major forces should be about the same. "

Later, the information provided by the Cangyu Bone Emperor made Ye Tian a little surprised.

Calamity Black Mountain once dispatched six third-level supreme beings, and a great battle broke out with other forces, in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

As for why the battle broke out, the Bone Clan didn't know, because the Bone Clan was too weak to approach.

Of course, this is the rhetoric of the Emperor of the Gloomy Bone.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, by the way, I'll provide you with a piece of information!" Emperor Cangyu said: "Among the many exotic worlds, the big forces are divided into grades, and those forces that do not have a supreme level existence will not be mentioned, all the forces that have a supreme level existence, but there is no second-level supreme level existence, they are called nameless forces, which means that they are not qualified to know the name, which means that they are weak." Having a second-level supreme powerhouse existence and having more than three supreme power-level existences is called a name-level force, indicating that it has the potential to attract attention. And those who have a third-level supreme powerhouse existence and have more than ten supreme power-level existences are called daimyo forces. And with an invincible-level existence, such a force is called a super-name power, and above the super-name-level power, it is said that there are also saint-level forces and eternal name-level forces. Those six major forces belong to the super-famous forces, and their strength is unfathomable!"

Nameless forces, nominee-level forces, big-name forces, super-name-level forces......

This division is very apt and simple, but it also presents the truth that the law of the jungle is the strong, and if you don't have the strength, you don't even have the qualifications to be remembered.

"According to this division, our human race can only be regarded as a nameless force!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Although he had reached the third level of the Supreme Ancestor, the human race did not have any Supreme Ancestor other than him, so he was not even considered a nominal power.

Moreover, the background of the human race is too low, not only is he the strongest ancestor, but even the ancestor is extremely rare.

Of course, as long as the human race has not survived a great tribulation so far, it is said that once the great tribulation has been passed, the luck will skyrocket, and cultivation will become easier.

Once a great tribulation has been overcome, the Terrans have the opportunity to give birth to many ancestors.

Afterwards, Ye Tian talked with the Cangyu Bone Emperor for a while before leaving.

Although I have a general understanding of the general strength of the six major forces, the pressure is even greater.

Of the six super-name-level forces, each force had at least one invincible-level existence, and each force had more than one or two third-level supreme existence comparable to him.

It is difficult for him to resist such a force.

"It seems that I must raise my strength to the level of near-invincibility of the Supreme Rank before the Dark Forbidden Tribulation arrives. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Knowing the strength of the six major forces, he had no idea of breaking into the six forbidden places.

At the very least, only the Bone Clan knew his strength at the moment, and the Bone Clan had no way to contact the people of the six major forces, so the six major forces did not know that the Dark Forbidden Domain had given birth to a third-level supreme ancestor.

If they knew, the six major forces might have sent more supreme beings during the Dark Forbidden Realm Tribulation.

Therefore, it is still beneficial to hide your strength and keep a low profile.

......

This time, he traded an Origin Rule Robbery Crystal from the Bone Clan, which would benefit Ye Tian a lot, at least he could easily create a few more Supreme Ancestral Techniques.

After all, it was becoming more and more difficult for him to fuse the Ultimate Ancestral Technique that fit the rules of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth now, and it would take a long time, and it would be very easy to fuse the Origin Rules that fit the Bone Clan's Heaven and Earth.

"The next Ultimate Ancestral Technique is to choose the Extreme Arm Ultimate Ancestral Technique!"

Ye Tian decided.

So, with the help of the Bone Clan's Origin Rule, he began to comprehend the Extreme Arm Ultimate Ancestral Technique that fit the rules of the Bone Clan's heaven and earth, and it didn't take long to successfully create the Extreme Arm Ultimate Ancestral Technique.

Then, he began to fuse the two Extreme Arm Ultimate Ancestral Techniques.

In the blink of an eye, an era of boundaries passed.

"Finally the fusion was successful, I didn't expect that the first time to fuse the ultimate ancestral technique that fits the rules of the bone clan heaven and earth is so easy, with the characteristics of derivation and the replication of the body, if there are enough different heaven and earth origin rules to rob the crystal, I am afraid that it will be enough to skyrocket the strength to a terrifying level in a short period of time!"

Ye Tian thought.

Successfully creating the Extreme Arm Supreme Ancestral Technique is equivalent to having the seventh Supreme Ancestral Technique, allowing Ye Tian's body to transform once again and increase his strength again.

Then, Ye Tian began to try to create the eighth Supreme Ancestral Technique.

This time, the ultimate ancestral skill he chose was the Golden Body Ultimate Ancestral Skill, and one more supreme defense ancestral skill would at least have a stronger life-saving ability.

And in order to create the Eighth Supreme Ancestral Technique, Ye Tian spent a half-realm era.

The ninth supreme ancestral technique, Ye Tian still chose to defend the supreme ancestral technique, and this time it took two realm epochs.
